case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL VS LENI MILLER PERSONELL, INC AKA LM PERSONELL INC.

docket_entries.description: UNTIMELY, SUB MUST BE AT LEAST 15 DAYS PRIOR.
